package rulefixtures

// scenario for panic_for_expected_errors: `panic()` used for expected error conditions like invalid input or missing config
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule621NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario621Negative(records []Rule621NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
